task: Phase 3 hardening from Phase 2 deferred backlog. 6 stories: parser gotcha fixes (3 classes), goreleaser+cosign signing infra, customer pilot prep kit, staging E2E test scaffold, catalog→markdown codegen, expected_cmd_pattern on T-RO corpus rows. Estimated 10-14 hours total. Order: parser fixes (US-201) foundation, codegen + corpus (US-202+US-203) parallel-safe, supply chain (US-204), pilot prep (US-205), staging E2E (US-206) last (creds-dependent).

stories.title: Fix 3 parser gotchas surfaced by Phase 2 fuzzer (trailing close-delimiter, nested-shell, quoted-subcommand)
acceptanceCriteria: src/axhub-helpers/consent.ts: tokensIfAxhubCommand가 leading/trailing parens + backticks + 따옴표를 stripped 한 후 tokens 비교 (gotcha #1: trailing close-delimiter contamination 'login)' → 'login')
src/axhub-helpers/consent.ts: collectCommandPositions가 bash -c "..." / eval "..." / sh -c '...' 안의 shell-string을 재귀적으로 parse (gotcha #2 + #3: nested sub-shell + recursive shell tokenization)

tests/consent.test.ts에 3개 새 describe block: (a) trailing-delimiter ('axhub auth login)', '(axhub auth login)' 케이스), (b) eval-nested-subshell (eval 'bash -c "axhub deploy create..."'), (c) recursive bash -c (bash -c '$(axhub deploy create...)')
각 새 describe block 최소 5개 assertion (총 +15 expect)
tests/fuzz-parser.ts의 documented gotcha 3개를 fuzzer 변종 generator에 포함 (이전엔 의도적으로 회피했음). bun run fuzz → 1100/1100 caught (1000 baseline + 100 newly-uncovered variants)
bun test → 241 + 새 tests, 0 fail
bun run typecheck → 0 errors

stories.title: Catalog → markdown codegen (architect M1 §3 follow-up)
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/codegen-catalog.ts (NEW): src/axhub-helpers/catalog.ts의 ERROR_CATALOG (Map<exitCode, ErrorEntry>) → references/error-empathy-catalog.md 자동 생성
Generated markdown shape: per exit code, 4-part Korean template (emotion + cause + action + button) — 기존 hand-written file과 schema 일치
package.json scripts: 'codegen:catalog': 'bun scripts/codegen-catalog.ts'
skills/deploy/references/error-empathy-catalog.md에 generation header 주석: '<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/codegen-catalog.ts. Edit catalog.ts then re-run. -->'
Idempotency test: bun run codegen:catalog 실행 → git diff = empty (이미 생성된 상태 그대로)
tests/codegen.test.ts (NEW): catalog.ts 수정 → markdown 출력 변경 검증 (snapshot 또는 fixture 비교, 최소 4 assertion)
smoke:full에 codegen:catalog 추가 (idempotency check로 drift 방지)

stories.title: expected_cmd_pattern 추가 to corpus T-RO rows (architect M2.5 §3 — scoring reproducibility)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/corpus.100.jsonl의 모든 read-only 카테고리 row (T-RO-* prefix 또는 destructive=false)에 expected_cmd_pattern 필드 추가 — 현재 일부만 있음, 전체 read-only로 확장
Regex format: 정확한 명령어 prefix matching (e.g., 'axhub apps list --json' 또는 'axhub apis list --app-id \\d+ --json'). 매칭 가능한 valid pattern.
tests/score.ts의 negative-case scoring 로직 review: expected_cmd_pattern이 정의된 read-only row에 대해 actual_cmd가 pattern과 매치하면 +pass, 아니면 +fail (기존 'no axhub command fired' 휴리스틱 보강)
tests/corpus.100.jsonl validation: 100 rows 모두에 expected_cmd_pattern (destructive면 mutation cmd 패턴, ro면 정확한 read 명령) — bash 또는 bun으로 schema validation script 작성
tests/corpus-schema.test.ts (NEW): 100 rows 각각 schema 검증 — id, utterance, intent, expected_skill, expected_cmd_pattern, destructive, lang 필드 모두 present + 타입 일치
M1.5 v2 score.ts re-run: trusted/unsafe/recovery 메트릭이 v2 verdict와 동일하게 나오는지 (regression 확인) — .omc/m1.5-verdict.v2.md 수치와 비교

stories.title: Goreleaser config + cosign GitHub Actions workflow (supply chain Phase 3)
acceptanceCriteria: .github/workflows/release.yml (NEW): on push tag v*.*.* → build all 5 archs (재사용 build:all script) → cosign keyless sign each binary (sigstore OIDC) → upload to GitHub Releases as assets + .sig sidecar files
.goreleaser.yml (NEW) — bun build wrapper: 5-arch matrix (darwin-arm64/amd64, linux-arm64/amd64, windows-amd64), checksums.txt, signed manifest.json with binary→arch→sha256 mapping
scripts/verify-release.sh (NEW, executable): downloads release assets + .sig + cosign-public-key.pem → cosign verify-blob each → exit 0 if all valid. Documents the user-side verification flow.

src/axhub-helpers/preflight.ts modification: if AXHUB_REQUIRE_COSIGN=1 and binary file is unsigned (no .sig sidecar in install dir), surface Korean warning '보안 검증 미통과: 이 helper 바이너리는 cosign 서명이 없어요. 회사 보안 정책에 따라 IT/admin에 문의하세요.' (do NOT block, just warn at session-start)
tests/release-config.test.ts (NEW): 5+ assertions on .github/workflows/release.yml + .goreleaser.yml shape (yaml parse, required keys, 5-arch matrix presence, cosign step present)
docs/RELEASE.md (NEW): step-by-step guide for repo maintainer to cut a release: tag → workflow auto-runs → user-side verification command (gh release download + bash scripts/verify-release.sh)
Note: actual cosign key generation + GitHub Secrets setup is out-of-scope (requires repo admin OIDC config) — README.md에 명시

stories.title: First-customer pilot prep kit (docs/pilot/ + onboarding checklist)
acceptanceCriteria: docs/pilot/README.md (NEW): pilot scope, success metrics, timeline (1 회사 × 5 vibe coders × 1 week), feedback collection mechanism

docs/pilot/onboarding-checklist.md (NEW): admin 초기 setup (회사 axhub team 생성, 5 vibe coder 토큰 발급, plugin install 안내), per-vibe-coder day-1 walkthrough (deploy → status → logs flow), 측정 지표 (time-to-first-deploy, deploy success rate, error message clarity rating 1-5)

docs/pilot/feedback-template.md (NEW): structured feedback form for vibe coders (Korean): 1) 첫 배포까지 막힌 곳, 2) 에러 메시지 이해도, 3) Korean copy quality, 4) 가장 짜증났던 순간, 5) 가장 만족스러웠던 순간. 30-min cadence, async OK.
docs/pilot/admin-rollout.ko.md (NEW): IT/admin 가이드 — 환경 변수 정책 (AXHUB_TELEMETRY 회사 정책에 따라 enable/disable 결정), HMAC consent 키 분리 정책, 사고 대응 (cosign verify failed 시 IT 호출), troubleshooting first-line
docs/pilot/exit-criteria.md (NEW): pilot 종료 시점 결정 기준 — 5/5 vibe coder가 성공 first deploy, 0 critical 사고 (token leak, cross-team list bypass), 평균 이해도 점수 ≥4/5, time-to-first-deploy <30분
5 docs 모두 한국어 + 영어 codeblock 혼합, vibe coder 친화 톤 유지

stories.title: ax-hub-cli staging E2E test scaffold (skip when creds missing)
acceptanceCriteria: tests/e2e/staging.test.ts (NEW): real ax-hub-cli + staging endpoint integration test. Skip entire suite if AXHUB_E2E_STAGING_TOKEN env var unset (graceful skip with informative message).

Test cases (when creds present): (a) 'axhub auth status' returns valid identity, (b) 'axhub apps list' returns ≥1 app, (c) parseAxhubCommand → consent-mint → simulated PreToolUse hook chain (mock the tool_call_id flow), (d) classify-exit on real exit codes from staging API

tests/e2e/README.md (NEW): how to run E2E tests — required env vars (AXHUB_E2E_STAGING_TOKEN + AXHUB_E2E_STAGING_ENDPOINT), how to obtain staging access (point to internal docs), CI vs local run differences
package.json scripts: 'test:e2e': 'bun test tests/e2e/' (separate from default 'test' script — E2E gated by env)
.github/workflows/release.yml에 optional e2e job: only runs if STAGING_TOKEN secret exists (gate via if check)
Local skip behavior verified: bun test:e2e without env → all tests skipped + clear console output 'Skipped: AXHUB_E2E_STAGING_TOKEN not set. See tests/e2e/README.md'
Note: actual staging credential procurement is out-of-scope (requires internal axhub access) — docs/RELEASE.md 또는 docs/pilot/admin-rollout.ko.md에 procurement path 명시

metadata.task_origin: /oh-my-claudecode:ralph 'Phase 3 backlog 이거 다 해봐' — Phase 2 deferred items full attempt
metadata.phase2_predecessor: Tier 1 ralph (063e849) + Phase 2 ralph (235d81c) — 241 tests baseline at session start
metadata.scope_reality: US-204 cosign actual key gen + US-205 actual customer recruit + US-206 actual staging cred procurement are HUMAN coordination tasks not autonomously executable by ralph. This PRD ships the technical infrastructure (workflow files, scripts, docs, scaffolds) that those human steps will use. The 'last mile' for each is documented in the corresponding files (RELEASE.md, pilot/admin-rollout.ko.md).
metadata.phase_4_deferred: Marketplace publish (after first cosign-signed release lands), additional language support beyond Korean, telemetry analytics dashboard, multi-region resolve cache
